name: @borjie/procurement-coordination
description: Veteran procurement coordination module — vendor registry + KYC (per-jurisdiction), framework agreements, catalog, requisitions with multi-level approval chain, RFQ/tender with sealed bidding, purchase orders + PDF generation, goods receipts, 3-way invoice match, budget controls with block-on-overspend, spend analytics, maverick-spend detection. Pure functions; injectable ports for storage, document studio, approval engine.
